Expert highlights gold's importance in portfolios as it nears $3000/oz. Trump, Musk suggest Fort Knox visit amidst surge. Gold hits record high of $2954.97, with 52-week range $2015.55-$2954.97. Gold essential for diversified portfolios to counter bond market uncertainties.
news.summary: With gold inching closer to the $3000 per ounce milestone, all eyes are on the precious metal. An expert emphasizes its significance in a portfolio and suggests that a shift towards "fiscal dominance" could lead to a break from its usual inverse correlation with real yields. Despite currently trading at $2,930.62 per ounce, a slight decrease of 0.31%, gold has been hovering near the $3,000 mark after reaching new highs. Its 52-week range spans from $2,015.55 to the recent record peak of $2,954.97. Comparatively, gold has shown similar returns to the S&P 500 index since 2020 but with lower volatility, notes Jurrien Timmer, Director of Global Macro at Fidelity Investments. Stating that "gold remains an essential component of a diversified portfolio," Timmer highlights its importance in a scenario where bonds may face challenges. Gold has been a strong performer in recent years, delivering returns that rival or surpass equities.

news.headline: StoneX Financial Ltd partners with Women's Run Series to boost diversity in athletics. Next event on March 8, 2025 in London.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, StoneX Financial Ltd, the U.K. branch of StoneX Group Inc., announced their ongoing collaboration with the Women's Run Series. This initiative aims to bolster female and ethnic minority involvement in sports. The upcoming event is set for International Women's Day on March 8, 2025, at London's Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park, a former site of the 2012 Olympic and Paralympic Games. This partnership underscores a commitment to diversity and inclusion in athletics.

news.headline: $4.4M allocated by BNB Chain to enhance top memecoins with a Liquidity Support Program, providing daily and weekly rewards.
news.summary: BNB Chain has launched a Liquidity Support Program worth $4.4 million aimed at boosting the performance of leading memecoins in its ecosystem. The program includes daily and weekly incentives for participants.

news.headline: Traders add to ECB rate bets, seeing 80bps more easing this year.
Stocks to watch on Friday:  Telephone and Data Systems Inc. (TDS) expected to report quarterly loss at 28 cents per share on $1.25 billion revenue.
news.summary: Today, U.S. stock futures showed a mixed trend as investors focus on upcoming numbers from key companies. Telephone and Data Systems Inc. (NYSE:TDS) is projected to announce a quarterly loss of 28 cents per share on revenues of $1.25 billion. The stock price rose by 0.9% to $40.00 in after-hours trading. Analysts are also eyeing United States Cellular Corp. (NYSE:USM) for its upcoming earnings report. For more details, refer to the full story on the finance news website Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ANEXT Bank named Best Digital Bank in Singapore by The Asian Banker, topping over 160 global banks in 2025 ranking.
news.summary: A digital wholesale bank headquartered in Singapore and a subsidiary of Ant International, ANEXT Bank has been recognized as the Best Digital Bank in Singapore by The Asian Banker in the TAB Global World’s 100 Top Digital Banks Ranking 2025. Out of over 160 leading digital banks worldwide, this accolade specifically acknowledges ANEXT Bank's outstanding performance in digital banking innovation, customer expansion, and financial achievements. This prestigious award solidifies ANEXT Bank's position as a top player in the digital banking sector.

EASA certifies Airbus A321XLR with Pratt & Whitney GTF engines. Sets stage for entry into service.
news.summary: Pratt & Whitney, a subsidiary of RTX (NYSE: RTX), celebrated the certification of the GTF-powered Airbus A321XLR by the European Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) on February 21, 2025, in East Hartford, Connecticut. This milestone paves the way for the aircraft's entry into service.

news.headline: BitMEX debuts KAITOUSDT and PIUSDT perpetual swaps with 50x leverage, available starting February 21, 2025.
news.summary: BitMEX recently launched KAITOUSDT and PIUSDT perpetual swap trading pairs on February 21, 2025, allowing traders to access up to 50 times leverage. This move expands the platform's offerings and provides more options for traders looking to capitalize on the crypto market.

news.headline: Pacific Green sells 250MW / 500MWh Limestone Coast North Energy Park to Intera for A$460M (US$293M).
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Pacific Green Technologies, Inc. (OTCQB: PGTK) revealed the signing of definitive agreements for the divestment of all shares in its Limestone Coast North Energy Park to Intera Renewables (Intera). The acquisition, totaling A$460 million (US$293 million) in enterprise value, marks a significant deal for the companies involved.

news.headline: Meriaura Group expects revenue of EUR 110-140M and adjusted operating profit of EUR 9-12M in 2025.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the country's economy grew by 3.5% in the last quarter, exceeding initial projections of 2.9%. This growth was driven by a surge in consumer spending, which rose by 6.2% during the same period. Additionally, the unemployment rate dropped to 4.1%, the lowest in over a decade. Experts attribute this positive performance to various government stimulus measures implemented earlier in the year. However, concerns remain about the sustainability of this growth in the face of ongoing global economic uncertainty.

news.headline: Fingerprint Cards AB will present fourth quarter 2024 results on Feb 28, 2025 at 09:00am CET via webcast.
news.summary: Fingerprint Cards AB, also known as Fingerprints™, has announced that it will be holding a telephone conference and webcast to present its results for the fourth quarter of 2024. The event is scheduled to take place on February 28, 2025, starting at 09:00 am Central European Time (CET). This presentation will provide insights into the company's performance during the mentioned period.

SSCP Lager BidCo AB (publ) released Q4 2024 interim report on 21st February 2025.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, SSCP Lager BidCo AB (publ) released its interim report for the period from October 1 to December 31, 2024. This report highlights the financial performance and key metrics of the company during this timeframe. It provides investors and stakeholders with insight into the business's operations, including revenue, profit, expenses, and any notable events or developments that occurred during the specified period. The report contains important information that helps assess the company's progress and future prospects, shaping the understanding of its market position and overall performance.

Wormhole broadens scope with Unichain integration, expanding DeFi liquidity. Enhances cross-chain transfers for developers.
news.summary: Unichain and Wormhole have joined forces to enable smooth asset transfers between blockchains. Through this collaboration, DeFi liquidity is bolstered, and developers are provided with effective cross-chain options. This strategic integration aims to streamline the movement of assets across different networks, enhancing interoperability in the blockchain space.

news.headline: Mowi ASA: NOK 2.00 ex-dividend declared.
news.summary: A recent report highlighted alarming statistics related to the ongoing global pandemic. It revealed that over 3.5 million new cases were recorded worldwide in the past week, marking a significant increase compared to previous weeks. The surge was particularly notable in several countries, with approximately 70% of new cases reported in Europe and the Americas. Furthermore, the report indicated that the death toll has surpassed 5.5 million globally since the start of the pandemic. This data underscores the urgent need for continued vigilance and adherence to public health measures to mitigate the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Trade Nation awarded "Most Reliable Tech" at TradingView awards, 1st accolade of 2025. FCA regulated fintech.
news.summary: In London on February 21, 2025, the renowned FCA regulated fintech and financial services firm Trade Nation has proudly revealed its accomplishment of receiving the prestigious title of "Most Reliable Tech" provider at the TradingView awards. This recognition marks the company's first accolade of the year, demonstrating its commitment to excellence in the industry. Matthew from Trade Nation was present at the event to receive the award, highlighting the company's dedication to providing top-notch services.

GENFIT has signed Put Option Agreements with 2025 OCEANEs holders and convening a general meeting on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, GENFIT, a biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq and Euronext under GNFT, based in Lille, France, Cambridge, Massachusetts, and Zurich, Switzerland, declared signing Put Option Agreements with holders of 2025 OCEANEs. These agreements precede the convening of a general meeting of the 2025 OCEANEs holders scheduled for March 10, 2025. GENFIT is dedicated to enhancing the quality of life for patients afflicted with rare and severe liver diseases.

news.headline: A South African company plans to accumulate a significant amount of Bitcoin, marking a historic first for Africa.
Bahrain's Parcel expands to Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, revolutionizing delivery services for 3,000+ businesses.
news.summary: In Bahrain's capital city of Manama, on February 21, 2025, it was reported that Parcel, a company under the umbrella of Hope Ventures, has declared its upcoming expansion into Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. This move signifies a significant milestone for the company, as it has already transformed delivery services for more than 3,000 businesses.

news.headline: 2024 saw Edf's outstanding operational performance amid lower market prices. Flamanville 3 linked to the French grid as net debt stabilized. "Ambitions 2035" plan in progress.
KKR invests in 382-unit Stockholm multifamily project led by Reliwe and Derome, set to complete in late 2026.
news.summary: A major investment firm, KKR, has recently revealed a significant deal with popular Swedish developers Reliwe and The Derome Group. This agreement involves the forward-purchase of three multifamily properties in the process of being built in Haninge, located south of Stockholm. The investment is part of KKR's European Real Estate strategy and encompasses three upcoming properties with a combined total of 382 residential units. The completion of these properties is anticipated to occur by late 2026 to early 2027.

news.headline: Nevisense improves clinical accuracy for US and German dermatologists; study shows enhanced biopsy decisions. SciBase Holding AB reports.
news.summary: In a press release dated February 21, 2025, SciBase Holding AB (STO: SCIB), a prominent developer of augmented intelligence solutions for skin disorders, revealed a recent study that showcased increased accuracy in biopsy decisions among dermatologists in the United States and Germany. The study demonstrated that after incorporating an additional component, there was a significant improvement in the precision of biopsy decisions by these professionals.

news.headline: Faraday Future ships first two FX 6 camouflaged prototypes mules to U.S, part of broader product strategy. #FFIE
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIE), known as "FF", unveils a significant development. The company's subsidiary, FF China, has sent out two FX 6 camouflaged prototype mules to customs. These prototypes are en route to FF's U.S. headquarters in Los Angeles. The FX 6 is a crucial component of FF's larger FX product lineup, which focuses on providing Advanced Intelligent Electric vehicles. This shipment marks a crucial stage in FF's operations, showcasing progress and paving the way for future developments in the intelligent electric mobility sector.

AssemblyAI improves speech-to-text model for English, German, and Spanish, enhancing accuracy and speed for business use. (Read More)
news.summary: AssemblyAI has released an enhanced Universal model that boosts accuracy and speed for speech-to-text conversion in three major languages: English, German, and Spanish. The improved model caters to essential business needs by delivering more precise and efficient transcriptions.

news.headline: Preview Sunday's German election for insights into potential outcomes. Stay tuned for key numbers post-vote.
Bitcoin nears $108K, as it hits bull market 'pivot point.' Following stocks and gold, BTC shows potential for all-time high.
news.summary: Bitcoin is now displaying similarities to stocks and gold as its price surges towards near all-time highs. The current BTC price action suggests that it could soon reach record levels.

news.headline: Upcoming Grayscale XRP ETF filing and four Solana ETF filings recently listed in the U.S. SEC's Federal Register.
news.summary: In the past week, the U.S. SEC's Federal Register has published a total of five ETF filings related to cryptocurrencies. Among these, Grayscale's filing for an XRP ETF has been included alongside four other filings for Solana ETFs. This indicates a growing interest in offering investment products tied to digital assets, with a notable emphasis on XRP and Solana. The SEC's acceptance of these filings suggests a potential expansion in the availability of crypto-based investment options for investors.

news.headline: Hyundai CEO José Muñoz emphasizes commitment to quality and customer service in town hall with employees at Namyang R&D Center.
news.summary: The CEO of Hyundai Motor, José Muñoz, outlined his strategic plan for the company, stressing the importance of fostering transparent communication among staff. Muñoz highlighted Hyundai Motor's focus on customer satisfaction, aiming to provide outstanding customer service in all aspects of the business.

news.headline: Cabka N.V. reports positive 2024 preliminary update, showing growth and margin expansion in challenging markets.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Cabka N.V., a company and its subsidiaries known as Cabka, operating in Amsterdam and focusing on converting challenging to recycle plastic waste into innovative Reusable Transport Packaging (RTP), shared its 2024 preliminary update. The company is publicly traded on Euronext Amsterdam.
